rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference visible ports, and in implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model scope in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must use valid scalar types (int, real, bool) and preserve type consistency in expressions.
Do not reference event ports as numeric or Boolean values unless explicitly defined as data/event-data in the model.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts; use only visible features.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and must be placed in valid AADL component type or implementation scopes.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use declared types and avoid package-qualified identifiers unless imported.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts.
Do not assume numeric or Boolean encodings for event ports without explicit model support.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
